query: SELECT ic.id, ic.channelNo, ic.label, ic.scale, ic.offset, ic.unit, ic.`precision`, ic.enabled, ic.currentValue FROM instrumentChannels ic JOIN weighingInstruments wi ON ic.instrumentId = wi.id WHERE wi.deviceCode = 'C001' ORDER BY ic.channelNo;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KBF53B6TGXz9Z1D.root --database SQ6yxhwuwXauyoM9DVdVk2 --execute SELECT ic.id, ic.channelNo, ic.label, ic.scale, ic.offset, ic.unit, ic.`precision`, ic.enabled, ic.currentValue FROM instrumentChannels ic JOIN weighingInstruments wi ON ic.instrumentId = wi.id WHERE wi.deviceCode = 'C001' ORDER BY ic.channelNo;
